creator: swear@blarg.net
text:
The LINT file lists a "pseudo-device loop" device for which there seems
(to new users, at least) to be no man page.  Actually it is "lo(4)".

While there are other pseudo-device without man pages (or at least ones
I could find), it would be helpful and easy to have a loop(4) which is
a link to lo(4).

================

Fix: 

Link loop.4.gz to lo.4.gz .

A less desirable solution would be to put a note in LINT.
How-To-Repeat: n/a
================
